title: RFC: remove aufs storage driver
body:
AFAIK aufs has never been upstreamed and from a quick search I could not find any distro who still supports it.

Do we know anyone using this storage driver still? Looking at the git log and issue I cannot really find any references pointing at users.Most changes seem to comes from global changes to the driver interface. 
Given that it seems like an unnecessary maintenance burden and I think it is time to remove it. From what I can see aufs hasn't been tested in over 4 years in upstream CI since https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/886/commits/a54d4e3a4bfbc823e69ef06439ed1cef2658674a

Is there a reason to keep it around?

comments.body: FWIW, docker removed it over two years ago https://github.com/moby/moby/commit/3903f16cd6dcd9e749c938252a5f00b43f78da8a so I guess we really don't need it
AFAICT the last Ubuntu LTS to include aufs was 20.04.

> AFAICT the last Ubuntu LTS to include aufs was 20.04.

That matches the commit which removed the CI tests so that lines up.


PR to drop it: https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/343
